# QA Playground — llms.txt
# https://www.qaplayground.com

> QA Playground is a free educational platform for QA automation engineers to learn and practice browser automation testing using Selenium, Playwright, and Cypress.

## What this site is

- 22+ interactive UI elements for automation practice (inputs, tables, modals, drag-drop, file upload, calendar, alerts, iframes, shadow DOM, etc.)
- A simulated Bank Demo App for end-to-end automation scenarios (login, accounts, transactions)
- A QA Study Tracker for tracking learning progress across syllabi and daily logs
- Blog and tutorials focused on QA automation testing
- Free QA tools (JSON to file converter, more coming soon)

## Primary audience

QA automation engineers, manual testers learning automation, developers writing end-to-end tests.

## Blog posts (most useful for reference)

- https://www.qaplayground.com/blog/how-to-write-effective-test-cases-with-real-world-examples
- https://www.qaplayground.com/blog/top-10-best-automation-practice-website
- https://www.qaplayground.com/blog/top-10-best-chrome-extension-for-automation-tester
- https://www.qaplayground.com/blog/lessons-i-learn-while-creating-qaplayground

## Practice pages (interactive automation testing elements)

- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/input
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/button
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/select
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/alert
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/radio

- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/waits
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/simple-table
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/advance-table
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/calendar
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/forms
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/upload-download
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/multi-select
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/links
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/frame
- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice/elements

## Other useful pages

- https://www.qaplayground.com/practice — full list of all practice elements
- https://www.qaplayground.com/bank — Bank Demo App for end-to-end test practice
- https://www.qaplayground.com/qa-tools — free tools for QA engineers
- https://www.qaplayground.com/study-tracker — QA study progress tracker

## Do not index

/admin/*
/api/*
